desc.en: The capital. Facing the 'reservation hell' of the Forbidden City and identity checks everywhere.
desc.cn: 首都。直面故宮「預約地獄」與無處不在的身份核驗。

text.cn: 故宮門票預約失敗！你不得不花高價向黃牛買票，資金 -200，精神值 -10。
text.en: Failed to reserve Forbidden City ticket! You had to buy from a scalper. Money -200, Sanity -10.

desc.en: A futuristic metropolis where scan-to-order and mini-programs rule the daily life.
desc.cn: 魔都。體驗掃碼點單與小程序強制綁定的高科技生活。

text.cn: 點單時強制要求綁定微信小程序並授權個人資訊，你花了 15 分鐘才關掉廣告彈窗，精神值 -5，時間 -0.5小時。
text.en: Forced to use WeChat mini-program to order. Spent 15 mins closing ads. Sanity -5, Time -0.5h.

desc.en: Spicy hotpot warning! Challenge your stomach and line up 4 hours for giant pandas.
desc.cn: 「微辣」警告！挑戰你的腸胃，並在熊貓基地排隊4小時。

text.cn: 低估了四川「微辣」的威力，你在馬桶上度過了大半天。精神值 -20，時間 -4小時。
text.en: Underestimated Sichuan's 'mild spicy'. Spent half the day in the restroom. Sanity -20, Time -4h.

desc.en: 3D cyber city. GPS navigation will fail completely. Prepare to climb endless stairs.
desc.cn: 3D魔幻立體城市。導航集體失靈，準備好用雙腿征服百級台階。

text.cn: 導航帶你走進了某棟大樓的 8 樓，出去發現居然又是馬路。你迷路了 2 小時，精神值 -15，時間 -2小時。
text.en: GPS led you to the 8th floor, only to find it connects to another street. Lost for 2h. Sanity -15, Time -2h.

desc.en: Silicon Valley of hardware. Experience unmanned retail and intense face recognition.
desc.cn: 硬件硅谷。體驗無人零售與無孔不入的人臉識別。

text.cn: 地鐵站出站體驗無人刷臉閘機失敗，被迫排長隊人工核驗。精神值 -5，時間 -0.5小時。
text.en: Failed to use facial recognition gate at subway. Forced to wait in a long manual line. Sanity -5, Time -0.5h.

desc.en: The exit port. Test your ability to manage dual currencies and pass immigration checkpoints.
desc.cn: 離境口岸。考驗雙幣切換與海關健康申報的絲滑程度。

text.cn: 在茶餐廳因為沒有港幣現金被加收了高額匯率差，資金 -50，精神值 -10。
text.en: Charged extra exchange fee at a cafe because you had no HKD cash. Money -50, Sanity -10.

desc.en: Ancient capital. Watch out for fake tour guides to Terracotta Army and explore Muslim Quarter.
desc.cn: 十三朝古都。提防兵馬俑山寨一日游，深夜探秘回民街。

text.cn: 成功識破路邊山寨兵馬俑一日遊導遊的騙局！精神值 +10，省下了冤枉錢。
text.en: Successfully spotted a fake Terracotta Army tour guide! Sanity +10, saved money.

desc.en: The Avatar mountains. Test your sanity on the terrifying glass bridge and infinite cableways.
desc.cn: 阿凡達懸浮山。在高空玻璃棧道與漫長索道中經受San值考驗。

text.cn: 站在高空玻璃棧道上雙腿發軟，進退兩難。精神值 -25，時間 -1.5小時。
text.en: Legs shaking on the glass bridge, paralyzed with fear. Sanity -25, Time -1.5h.

desc.en: Stunning karst mountains. Dodge pushy bamboo raft vendors and chill in West Street bar zone.
desc.cn: 山水甲天下。在灕江竹筏消費陷阱與陽朔西街酒吧中周旋。

text.cn: 在灕江竹筏被強推拍照服務，拒絕後遭遇竹筏師傅「龜速前行」報復。精神值 -15，時間 -1小時。
text.en: Refused photo service on bamboo raft. Driver retaliated by going extremely slow. Sanity -15, Time -1h.

desc.en: Requires special Tibet Travel Permit. Entering illegally will trigger immediate deportation!
desc.cn: 需要額外申請「入藏函」。免簽或144小時過境簽強行前往會被直接遣返！

text.cn: 高原反應突襲！你不得不花錢買高壓氧氣瓶並在旅館躺了一整天。資金 -150，精神值 -20，時間 -24小時。
text.en: Altitude sickness struck! Had to buy oxygen cylinders and rest in hotel. Money -150, Sanity -20, Time -24h.

desc.en: Extreme security checks at every checkpoint and drone bans. Sunset is at 10 PM here!
desc.cn: 極其頻繁的安全檢查與無人機禁飛限制。這裡晚上10點太陽才下山！

text.cn: 安全檢查排隊長達 2 小時，無人機開機直接被扣押警告。精神值 -20，時間 -2小時。
text.en: Waited 2 hours for security check. Drone confiscated. Sanity -20, Time -2h.

desc.en: The ancient southern capital. Battle the immense crowds at Confucius Temple and experience the city's obsession with duck dishes.
desc.cn: 六朝古都。在夫子廟的人潮中擠進擠出，體驗金陵人「無鴨不成席」的執念。

text.cn: 在排隊買鴨血粉絲湯時被插隊，精神值 -10。但分量很足，飽腹感 +15（精神值微幅恢復 +5）。
text.en: Someone cut in front of you while queuing for duck soup. Sanity -5.

desc.en: Paradise on Earth, or maybe a 'desert of gourmet food'. Navigate through shared-bike gridlocks to find a quiet spot on the West Lake.
desc.cn: 人間天堂，亦是傳說中的「美食沙漠」。在共享單車的重重包圍中，尋找西湖畔最後一絲清靜。

text.cn: 午餐嘗試了西湖醋魚，味道一言難盡。花費了高昂餐費，胃部與心靈同時受到重創。資金 -120，精神值 -25。
text.en: Tried West Lake Vinegar Fish. Terrible taste, expensive price. Money -120, Sanity -25.

desc.en: Tropical escape. Dodge duty-free shopping traps and hold onto your wallet against high-priced seafood restaurants.
desc.cn: 熱帶避寒勝地。在免稅店的剁手誘惑與海鮮大排檔的價格刺客中努力保持理智。

text.cn: 在海鮮大排檔遭遇「天價椰子雞與海鮮秤重刺客」，錢包大出血！資金 -450，精神值 -20。
text.en: Encountered seafood rip-off. Huge loss of money. Money -450, Sanity -20.
